reviews.review_description:
This is my honest and unbiased review. The app is very well polished from a technical standpoint. You can tell the developers have spent a lot of time working with the graphics, usability, and interactive elements. And the execution was really well done, I felt very immersed and Megan Thee Stallion was right in front of me. I can definitely say it was a unique experience and would be excited to see other artists.

The cons though are that it did feel very passive. I just sat there and watched, but didn’t have a concert feel to it. No real electricity or buzz, and that’s what makes concerts special. And all the files take wayyy too much space. I had to delete a few apps just to fit it on my Quest 2. I can’t imagine how much space more performers would take. Maybe instead the songs can be streamed instead of downloaded.

So it was a cool unique experience to try, but I don’t feel like it has much rewatch factor and takes up too much space so I won’t keep it on my headset, unless the songs are streamable.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your feedback! We are working to reduce the download size without compromising the video quality. We’re also looking into more ways to make our concerts more social and immersive. We aim to improve both of these issues by the time we release more VR concerts next year. Thank you again!

reviews.review_description:
The Future of "Immersive Virtual Reality Music"  has finally arrived! Thank's to Megan Thee Stallion and all the developers and artists that made this unbelievable experience happen!!!
Shout Out to "Jaron Lanier" for making this possible.....✌🏻👍🏻

I genuinely never thought I would ever get this close to Megan Thee Stallion, but now it feels like I have in a way. She’s honestly just right there performing a concert for one in these fantastic virtual worlds. I loved the interactive elements, too. Totally unexpected.
Way better than I ever expected. Truly amazing. 3D background graphic, haptic feedback and 3D modeling of Megan were all tremendous. Expecting another star would come out soon!

reviews.review_title: Feel Megan's energy in your veins!!!
reviews.review_description: This is insane!!! It felt like Megan was dancing in front of me in real life.. I could feel her energy run through my veins!! I had originally planned on watching the concert on my couch, but I ended up dancing with her throughout the entire concert. I loved the realistic special effects and the futuristic set designs, as well as the interactive movements I could make with my hands. I'm soooooo excited to see more concerts using this app, and I hope more and more artists will collaborate with the app developer! This was a 7 star experience!!

Omg- I really enjoyed this Mini personal concert I just traveled too. At first it took a moment to download but I enjoyed throwing the cartridge in the air and watching it come back. That was cool props to who designed that. Second the Graphics ￼were so pristine and visually appealing to the eye. I loved every part of this concert. The Details in the drums and the details in her eyes all I can say is Buy the Dang thing you won’t be Mad.. it was Fire 🔥 no literally 🔥… Make sure you move your hands around and look around it’s definitely a Dope app.

Thank you for selecting me Access prior to your real release .
This app really really sucks y u gotta pay for something u can watch on YouTube for free. Wack app.. how do u delete this?

reviews.review_title: The best quality VR concert ever
reviews.review_description: Doesn't need to add any comments, Awesome!

this is my second app for Oculus after Youtube VR and was really impressive.
it gave me 120% immersion which I can't feel with casual audios.
I'm willing to collect contents card if my favorite musicians come out!!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We plan to release more VR concerts in 2023 with a variety of artists and genres. We hope your faves will be among them!

reviews.review_description: This is so cool to observe in VR. Well made and I am excited for the future of this company!

i got a quest 2 recently and have been exploring the VR life. i honestly did not really have an idea of what to expect but i was not disappointed! it was one of the coolest things i've experienced. the interactivity was a nice add on and it really felt immersive, in addition to feeling like megan thee stallion was right in front of me. it was basically a front row seat! i'm excited to see where the technology goes and for more content to come through.
Amazing...I can't wait for what is in store next Clear, crisp and interactive...just what a VR experience should be.

reviews.review_title: Best Non Game VR Content on App Lab
reviews.review_description:
I recently had the chance to experience the VR concert app by AmazeVR featuring Megan Thee Stallion, and I have to say, it was an absolutely incredible experience. The app immerses you in a virtual world where you can watch Megan Thee Stallion perform just for you, in an incredibly realistic and engaging way.

The graphics and visuals are absolutely stunning, and the performance feels like you are right there in front of her. The app also includes interactive elements such as the ability to interact with some really cool synchronized hand gestures.

Megan Thee Stallion's performance was nothing short of electrifying. She was lively, engaging and her energy was contagious, you can't help but to move and sing along. The virtual concert was so realistic that I felt like I was at a real concert. The sound quality was amazing, and the overall experience was truly immersive.

Overall, I highly recommend the VR concert app by AmazeVR featuring Megan Thee Stallion. It's an innovative and exciting way to experience music, and it's an experience that I won't soon forget. If you're a fan of Megan Thee Stallion, or just love music in general, this app is a must-try.

This is pretty much comfortable, solid VR app where I can fully dive deep into immersive experience. 

It was so real that Megan Thee Stallion is performing right in front of me, and I was able to see the entire performance so clearly. 

I also loved those elements where you can interact with during the concert.

If you are a big fan of VR (and also music!) and want to see the future of VR concert, I would highly recommend to try this app. 

This is very promising!
The quality of the content stands out! The visuals are top-notch. The audio quality is really good. Headphones recommended. Looking forward to more content and artists.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind review! We aim to release more VR concerts early next year.

reviews.review_title: Great Visuals, but what does it cost $$?
reviews.review_description: I liked the preview they let you see. I didn’t like I couldn’t see the prices for buying other songs or the full experience before clicking the BUY button. The video quality was crisp. The intro was a bit long before you get into the concert/song. I ended up uninstalling the app, but it was nice to see that the quality was there.

developer_response.body: We apologize for any confusion. We will work to improve transparency in pricing in the future. Thanks for checking out our app and for your honest feedback!

reviews.review_title: I loved every second of this!
reviews.review_description: Megan Thee Stallion is 😍
You have to write that it is only a short demo.

developer_response.body:
Apologies for any confusion. As stated in our product description: "The free trial offers a preview of one interactive stage." 

To view the full VR concert, you do need to purchase the Megan Thee Stallion 'Enter Thee Hottieverse' VR Concert Pack. Again, our apologies if this was not clear.

reviews.review_description: I loved the intro that made good use of the characteristics of "VR". And the graphic details were good, and it was a fun form of performance that any fan of "Megan" would really fall in love with.
THE WEEKEND PLEEEEASE!!!!!! That sets off my imagination of what you got goin on here. Keep up the come up guys

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the review! We’d love to work with The Weeknd! The best way to let artists know you want to see their VR concert is to tweet at them and tag @AmazeVR

Keep an eye out for more VR concerts later this year!
